name: Potato and Cheese Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 4 large Red skinned potatoes with skin
2 cups Olive oil in a bottle; for drizzling, approximately
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Oil the bottom of an 8x10-inch baking dish.
3. Using a vegetable slicer or very sharp knife, slice sweet potatoes as thin as possible.
4. Slice baking and red skin potatoes as needed, to prevent browning.
5. Cover the bottom of the dish with a layer of Idaho potato slices, slightly overlapping.
6. Drizzle with oil, sprinkle with garlic and cheeses, and season with salt and pepper.
7. Top with sweet potatoes, then red skin potatoes, seasoning, and sprinkling each layer.
8. Continue layers until all potatoes are used up, reserving enough cheese to fully cover the top layer.
9. Cover with foil and bake until potatoes are fork tender. Remove and let sit before cutting.
